description: Style NoteThe rising temperature has us all in a tizzy but this stylish pair of sandals is one reason why we love the summer! This season, peep toe sandals and beaded thongs work with dressy shirts and cropped trousers (don't forget to add a statement necklace to this ensemble) catwalk comes up with warm weather footwear essentials that turn traditional fashion styles on its head. This beautifully crafted pair will transform your daily spring wear with a bold yet graceful edge. Product DetailsBrown criss-crossing forefoot straps and a yellow buckled ankle strapTough heel collar and a nautical themed white and blue striping on the footbed Yellow heel patch on the footbed with brandingTapering heel with a plastic heel cap and a TPU outsole   Material and Care   SyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dustDo not store under sunlight
